data.title: Recruit Limitless offers unlimited hiring plans starting at $999/month for businesses globally, aiming to revolutionize recruitment.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, companies in New York and Los Angeles were introduced to Recruit Limitless by Hyperlink InfoSystem. This subscription-based recruitment service is changing the industry by offering unlimited hiring for a fixed fee. In a time where recruiting top talent is expensive and time-intensive, this innovative model provides businesses with a cost-effective solution. This disruption in the recruitment sector aims to offer companies in these cities access to a limitless pool of candidates, reducing the burden and financial strain of traditional hiring processes.

data.title: American Dream Institute launched to engage young Americans with data-driven messaging & tech tools. NAPA, Calif., Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: In an effort to equip progressive leaders, creators, and organizations with data-driven messaging and tech tools to engage young Americans, a new digital-first initiative is set to launch. Recent research has revealed that shared economic challenges are bringing together a generation that is otherwise divided. This initiative, based in NAPA, Calif., aims to bridge the gap by providing crucial resources. The initiative, which will be unveiled on August 22, 2025, seeks to address the needs of young Americans facing economic hardships.

data.title: Edison Equity Residential, LLC partners with ARCTRUST to develop 165-residence 55+ community in Woodforest, Texas. #InnovativeLiving
data.description: Edison Equity Residential, headquartered in Texas, partnered with ARCTRUST on August 8, 2025, to establish a new 165-residence community that aims to revolutionize age-restricted living with a strong emphasis on customized, amenity-rich lifestyles. This joint venture, located in Houston, signifies a significant investment in redefining residential living for older adults, showcasing a commitment to innovative and service-oriented housing solutions.

data.title: Teamworks and ESPN partner for college football, providing Coaching and Scouting platform to ESPN's research team.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, on August 22, 2025, Teamworks, a leading provider of the Operating System for Sports™ used by over 6,500 top-tier sports teams worldwide, unveiled a new collaboration with ESPN. This strategic partnership will grant ESPN's research team access to Teamworks' Coaching and Scouting platform. This move aims to enhance the network's sports coverage and analysis capabilities.

data.title: Sarah Personette joins LifeStance Health board; Director William Miller to resign. Aug. 22, 2025. LFST stock.
data.description: Director William Miller will be resigning from his position in LifeStance Health, a prominent provider of outpatient mental health care services. This was disclosed on August 22, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona. LifeStance Health, listed on NASDAQ as LFST, revealed that Sarah Personette will be taking over the role. LifeStance Health is known for being a major player in the mental health care sector, serving a significant number of patients across the nation.

data.title: Flowers Foods (NYSE: FLO) declares a quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share, up 3.1% from last year.
data.description: In Thomasville, Georgia on August 22, 2025, Flowers Foods, Inc. disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share as declared by its board of directors. This marks a 3.1% rise from the prior year's quarter. The company's streak continues with this being their 92nd consecutive quarterly dividend payout. Flowers Foods trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FLO.

data.title: Unitree G1 robot grabs global attention with viral moments, promises joy and companionship. Making humanoid integration worldwide.
data.description: Based in Hangzhou, China, as of August 22, 2025, robotics company Unitree is committed to developing enjoyable, approachable, and interactive robots for the general population. Its goal is to provide happiness and companionship through robotics technology. The company is expanding the reach of its humanoid robot, the G1 model, globally.

data.title: Nikon Inc. unveils NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II lens, fastest AF & lightest weight, setting new performance standard.
data.description: Nikon Inc. has recently unveiled the latest addition to the NIKKOR Z lineup, the high-performance NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II lens. Engineered for superior reliability and agility, this next-generation zoom lens is designed to set a new benchmark for performance. The lens promises exceptional quality and versatility, with a focal length range of 24-70mm and a fast aperture of f/2.8. The NIKKOR Z 24-70mm f/2.8 S II is set to redefine standards in its class, targeting photographers and videographers seeking top-notch image quality and precision.

data.title: PPL Corporation to pay $0.2725 per share stock dividend quarterly on Oct. 1, 2025. Shareowners of record by Sept. 10, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2725 per share, to be paid on October 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 10, 2025. PPL Corporation, based in Allentown, Pennsylvania, is a renowned company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol PPL.

data.title: Jeffrey Katzenberg joins Nova Sky Stories with Kimbal Musk, guiding company's next stage of growth.
data.description: Nova Sky Stories, a prominent drone entertainment company, based in Boulder, Colorado, revealed today that Jeffrey Katzenberg, Founding Partner of WndrCo, has come on board as a strategic advisor. This partnership will see Katzenberg joining Nova’s Board of Directors and collaborating closely with Kimbal Musk, Co-Founder and CEO, as well as the Nova leadership group, to steer the company through its upcoming phase of expansion. WndrCo, the investment firm associated with Katzenberg, will also be involved in this strategic alliance.

data.title: Global liquid biopsy market to hit USD 7.05 billion by 2030, driven by rising cancer cases & technological advancements.
data.description: The global liquid biopsy market has shown significant growth, increasing from US$3.65 billion in 2024 to US$4.03 billion in 2025. Forecasts project a robust CAGR of 11.8% from 2025 to 2030, reaching a valuation of US$7.05 billion by then. Key drivers include the rising cancer incidence, adoption of precision medicine, and technological advancements. Liquid biopsy offers a minimally invasive way to detect cancer biomarkers, aiding in early disease detection and personalized treatment. Beyond oncology, its applications extend to non-invasive prenatal testing and organ transplantation monitoring. Technological innovations like next-generation sequencing and digital PCR enhance the sensitivity and reliability of liquid biopsy, making it a valuable tool in various healthcare settings.
